title: Lakeland Bakeware Multi Purpose Oven Tray Baking Tin - Rectangular 35.5 x 25.5 cm
features: All-purpose tray, ideal for roasting and baking
Holds our Crisper Oven Tray for broiling
Two layers of Quantum 2 professional non-stick
Oven safe up to 240°C Sure-grip handles
Buy this product from Lakeland & you can return it for up to 3 years, proof of purchase is necessary
description: As its name suggests, this versatile tin can be used for roasting and baking. Quality Made from heavy-duty 1mm thick carbon steel, it has a double layer of Quantum 2 professional non-stick, is oven safe up to 240°C and, because it has no rolled edges where water can become trapped, it can go straight in the dishwasher for easy cleaning. Performance Offers highly efficient heat distribution for even cooking and its generous handles with sure-grip silicone inserts mean getting it in and out of the oven will be easy. No rolled edges The rolled edges found on most bakeware introduce a difficult-to-dry space underneath the rim, and the edges themselves can be difficult to coat. We decided to leave the edges of our bakeware unrolled, removing the risk of water traps and uncoated carbon steel edges that might rust – making them completely dishwasher safe. Ovenware that looks as good as it cooks Whatever you’re cooking or baking, you’ll find the right tin for the task in our Lakeland Ovenware range. Made from heavy-duty carbon steel with a Quantum 2 professional non-stick coating, they give a firm foundation to help your recipes turn out brilliantly. They’re dishwasher safe, durable and reliable, but it’s the extra little details we’ve added that sets them apart from the rest. 3 Year Guarantee If you buy this product from Lakeland and you're not 100% satisfied, you can return it for up to 3 years – proof of purchase is necessary.
